title: A fast quantum mechanical algorithm for database search
abstract: Anunsorted database contains N records, of which just one satisfies a particular property. The problem is to identify that one record. Any classical algorithm, deterministic or probabilistic, will clearly take O (N) steps since on the average it will have to examine a large fraction of the N records. Quantum mechanical systems can do several operations simultaneously due to their wave like properties. This paper gives an O (JN) step quantum mechanical algorithm for identifying that record. It is within a constant factor of the fastest possible quantum mechanical algorithm.
publication_info: LK Grover - Proceedings of the twenty-eighth annual ACM …, 1996 - dl.acm.org
